weather.conditions: Mostly sunny, occasional afternoon thunderstorms. Bring sunscreen and a light jacket for the AC.

emergency.nearest_hospital: Summit Medical Center, 500 Hospital Drive (1.2 miles)
emergency.pharmacy: CVS at 200 Main Street (0.1 miles), open 7AM-10PM

attractions.name: Riverside Walk
attractions.description: Scenic walking path along the river, great for morning jogs or evening strolls.

attractions.name: Tech Museum
attractions.description: Interactive technology exhibits including a retro computing gallery and AI demo lab.

attractions.name: Downtown Market
attractions.description: Open-air market with local food vendors, crafts, and live music on weekends.

attractions.name: City Park
attractions.description: Large urban park with walking trails, a lake, and free evening concerts in the amphitheater.

attractions.name: Craft Beer District
attractions.description: Six craft breweries within walking distance, most with food menus and outdoor seating.

tips: The conference badge gets you 10% off at most downtown restaurants — just show it.
Best coffee near the venue: Edge Cafe (100 ft from the east entrance).
Afternoon thunderstorms usually last 30-60 minutes. The venue has covered walkways to the parking garage.
Food trucks outside the south entrance are popular — get there before 12:30 for shorter lines.
The shuttle to partner hotels runs until 10PM. After that, rideshare is your best bet.
Quiet room on Level 3 is great for focused work between sessions.
